creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213429
py-django-simple-history-2.8.0.patch

Hi,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-django-simple-history to 2.8.0 and assigns it to Django 2.2 (current LTS release) because Django 1.11 is End-of-Life since April 2020.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.3-RELEASE amd64 for each py35, py36, py37 and py38 flavor) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
